metadata.title:
Landseekers From Middle
West Preparing to Come
by Special Trains to


Spokane.

pages.raw_text:
Another great influx of home
seekers, investors and spectators
from the east into this section Of
the Inland Empire will begin with
in very short time. This has been
practically assured by advices from
the east to the effect that several
special carloads of farmers and or
chardists who have become attract
ed. by the showing of the Spokane
country in the agricultural and
horticultural world, will start this
way on home seeking tour about
the middle of the month.


THE CITY THAT DOES THINGS


A large percentage of the in
terest being taken in the farming
and fruit raising districts tributary
to the "City That Does Things" is
due to the advertising given it by
